## Evidence and boundary check

- [ ] External facts stay separate from source evidence.
- [ ] Red Hat relevance is framed as a hypothesis, not proof of customer intent, fit, demand, renewal, deployment, ownership, or complete coverage.
- [ ] Validation action is explicit and does not imply a sales outcome.
- [ ] NAPS or hierarchy labels remain configuration, not hard-coded universal structure.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
